base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of dr_wright — a character (npc) from 1989 simcity. Dr. Wright — city-planner advisor NPC. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Dr. Wright — city-planner advisor NPC; talking head + 12+ reaction faces (happy/concerned/worried/alarmed). Named after Will Wright
